goal: non-ga-todos: close every still-open backlog item in docs/status/release-todo.md except GA blocker §1 (MutationProposal accept path / public GA), with AGENTS.md status hygiene (close entries in release-todo and add product-done rows for shipped work).
summary: Close all non-GA release-todo backlog items in one coordinated sweep.
acceptanceCriteria: Every open release-todo entry except GA blocker §1 is implemented and marked resolved with supporting notes
docs/status/product-done.md records one-line shipped entries for all backlog items closed in this sweep
Frontend changes pass eslint + typecheck + CI=true jest + vite build
Backend changes pass pytest + ruff in backend/

tasks.name: close-non-ga-release-todo-items
tasks.scopedGoal: Implement and close every open item in docs/status/release-todo.md except GA blocker §1, including Beta blockers §2/§3/§6, soft blockers §4/§5/§7, and polish items §14/§15/§16/§16b/§16c/§16d, then update docs/status/product-done.md per AGENTS.md.
tasks.brief: Treat docs/status/release-todo.md as the source of truth for what remains open. Do not touch GA blocker §1 except to keep references accurate. Ship concrete code, tests, and ops/docs updates needed to close each remaining non-GA entry. For each closure, update release-todo status text and add a one-line shipped note in docs/status/product-done.md under the relevant table. Keep behavioral changes production-safe and include migration notes where applicable (especially auth token scope, provider failover, integration test plumbing, and multi-worker backend readiness).
acceptance: release-todo only keeps GA blocker §1 as open; all other previously open entries are marked resolved or explicitly moved out with rationale
product-done includes one-line entries for each non-GA release-todo closure completed in this task
All changed FE/BE tests and required quality gates run and pass, with evidence captured in handoff
tasks.verify: Run targeted and full-stack checks needed by changed surfaces. Minimum expected when touched: frontend eslint/typecheck/jest/vite build and backend pytest+ruff. Include command outputs and any caveats in handoff.

tasks.name: verify-non-ga-release-todo-closure
tasks.scopedGoal: Independently verify that docs/status/release-todo.md has no open backlog items except GA blocker §1 and that required docs/test evidence exists.
tasks.brief: Audit docs/status/release-todo.md headings and status notes after the closeout branch changes. Confirm that each previously open non-GA item is genuinely closed by corresponding implementation evidence in diff + tests. Confirm docs/status/product-done.md has matching one-liners per AGENTS.md. If any item is still open or unjustified, fail verification with exact gaps.
acceptance: Verifier reports pass only if release-todo open items are limited to GA blocker §1
Verifier confirms AGENTS.md backlog hygiene is satisfied for all newly closed items

tasks.name: release-todo-doc-hygiene-closeout
tasks.scopedGoal: Apply verifier findings so AGENTS backlog hygiene is fully satisfied for non-GA release-todo closure: add explicit product-done one-liners for closed §2/§4/§5/§6/§7 work and reconcile stale open/counter text in status docs.
tasks.brief: Use handoff findings from verify-non-ga-release-todo-closure as the source of truth for remaining cleanup. Update docs/status/product-done.md so each newly closed release-todo section from this sweep has an explicit one-line shipped entry with a release-todo pointer. Reconcile contradictory text (e.g. 'What is open' / auth section references to now-closed §3) and stale numeric evidence counts in release-todo verification snippets. Keep this task docs-only; do not reopen implementation scope unless documentation cannot be made truthful without code changes.
acceptance: product-done has explicit one-line closure entries for §2, §4, §5, §6, and §7 from this sweep
release-todo and product-done no longer contradict each other about what remains open (except GA §1)
Updated docs reference current test/suite counts or avoid stale hard-coded counts

tasks.name: verify-release-todo-doc-hygiene-closeout
tasks.scopedGoal: Verify AGENTS backlog hygiene is fully met after docs closeout and no non-GA release-todo backlog remains open.
tasks.brief: Audit docs/status/release-todo.md and docs/status/product-done.md only. Confirm that all non-GA open items are closed and each newly closed item has explicit product-done tracking entries; fail with exact missing bullets if not.
acceptance: Verifier confirms AGENTS doc-close requirements are met for this sweep
Only GA blocker §1 remains open in release-todo
